title: Lambdas should not invoke other lambdas synchronously
description: Invoking one lambda function synchronously from another can lead to increased latency, higher costs, and potential for timeouts. It is recommended to use asynchronous invocation or event-driven approaches to decouple lambda executions.
recommendation: Refactor your code to avoid synchronous invocations between lambda functions. Use asynchronous mechanisms or event-driven workflows instead.
impact: Synchronous invocation of lambdas can cause performance bottlenecks and increase operational costs.

checks.message: Refactor your code to avoid synchronous invocations between lambda functions. Use asynchronous mechanisms or event-driven workflows instead.
